sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 105

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 105:1
items.html:
(to the question) Six Nekudot [points]
In the Ibur, only three Nekudot are revealed in it, which are NHY; for HGT have no discernments of Aviut and Masach, and therefore they clothe and are incorporated within the three Nekudot of NHY. But at Yenika [suckling] it acquires the Aviut of Behina Aleph, and then that Aviut comprises six Nekudot, which are HGT NHY. And remember here that Nekudot means the Aviut of a Masach, which couples by striking with the upper Light and brings out the measure of the level. (Items 53 and 55)
